Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set One, And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-23-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED.

Defendant's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set One, is moot in part and granted in part.
The motion is moot as to Nos. 1, 2,17 and 29.
Responses which incorporate by reference are inadequate. There is no right to reserve the right to supplement responses except as allowed pursuant to CCP Section 2030.310. Responses must be complete at the time they are made.
The motion is granted as to Nos. 3-15, 18, 19, 21, 25, 28, and 30.
The motion is granted as to No. 16 as the response is inadequate as it reserves the right to supplement the response. The response otherwise may be adequate.
The motion is moot as to Nos. 20, 26, and 27 unless they must be supplemented based upon a further response to Nos. 19 and 25.
Further responses shall be made within 15 days of notice of this order. Defendant's request for sanctions is denied.
COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT (612)

Mo To Compel Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, Set Two
Off Calendar Aug-09-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Joseph Harbison III's Motion to Compel Further Responses to Request for Production of Documents [Set Two] granted in part, denied in part, as follows:
a) Request for Production nos. 1 through 12, inclusive, denied;
b) Within 10 days of the hearing, plaintiff shall serve on defendant a declaration, or other verified pleading, which identifies the specific documents responsive to each of the Requests for Production no. 13 through 24, inclusive. If plaintiff at deposition previously has identified the subject documents responsive to the individual requests, plaintiff may provide page and line references from deposition transcripts, in lieu of declaration. If the documents have not previously been identified as responsive to these specific requests, plaintiff shall submit a declaration as described.
c) Request for sanctions denied. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT
